upcomingDecision.label: 4th EFF review — Executive Board
upcomingDecision.note: The 3rd EFF review and 2nd RSF review were completed by the IMF Executive Board on May 8, 2026. The next (4th) EFF review is expected around December 2026, assessed against end-June 2026 performance criteria; a staff-level agreement typically precedes the Board date by several weeks.

items.label: Inflation
items.actual: Rose as global energy prices passed through

reviews.name: Board Approval
reviews.note: 37-month EFF approved; immediate disbursement of about SDR 760M (~$1bn).

reviews.name: 1st Review
reviews.note: 1st EFF review completed; ~$1bn disbursed. The Resilience and Sustainability Facility (RSF) was also approved on this date.

reviews.name: 2nd Review
reviews.note: 2nd EFF review and 1st RSF review completed (PR 25/411); ~$1bn EFF + ~$200M RSF disbursed.

reviews.name: 3rd Review
reviews.note: 3rd EFF review and 2nd RSF review completed (PR 26/147); ~$1.1bn EFF + ~$220M RSF disbursed. Total under both arrangements reached ~$4.8bn.

reviews.name: 4th Review
reviews.note: Expected around December 2026, based on end-June 2026 performance criteria. Amount is an estimate.

reviews.name: 5th Review
reviews.note: Expected around mid-2027. Amount is an estimate.

reviews.name: 6th & Final Review
reviews.note: Final review near the 37-month programme end (Oct 2027). Amount is an estimate.

relatedFacilities.note: Separate 28-month climate-resilience facility (SDR 1bn ≈ $1.4bn), approved May 9, 2025. The 1st review (Dec 2025) and 2nd review (May 2026) released about $200M and $220M respectively. Tracked separately from the $7B EFF progress bar.

keyObjectives: Achieve primary fiscal surplus of 1% of GDP (1.6% expected in FY26)
Broaden tax base — raise tax-to-GDP ratio above 13%
Build foreign exchange reserves to $13B+ (SBP-held; $16B at end-Dec 2025)
Reform energy sector SOEs to reduce circular debt
Reduce inflation to SBP's 5–7% medium-term target
Phase out fiscal incentives for SEZs/STZs by 2035
Establish Pakistan Regulatory Registry by Jun 2027
methodologyNote: Manually curated from IMF Executive Board decisions and press releases (PR 24/362, 25/411, 26/147) plus Pakistani financial media. The 3rd EFF review and 2nd RSF review were completed on May 8, 2026. Completed-review amounts are the figures IMF announced; future review dates and amounts are estimates subject to IMF/Pakistan agreement. EFF amounts are in SDR (USD equivalents vary with the exchange rate); the $7B headline reflects SDR 5,320M.
